cluster_label: Pretend play with people, places and feelings
educational_objective: Pretend play stretches to whole scenarios — someone gets in, goes somewhere, needs help, comes home. Simple sturdy pieces leaving space for the child's story.
age_stage_nuance: Versus 31–33m soft doll care and 28–30m kitchen copy-play, nearly-three children want WHOLE SCENES with people, vehicles and places — journeys, rescues and returns — not single-action nurturing or stirring. Band includes 34–35 month children who are still under 36 months, so Ages 3+ / ‘not suitable under 3 years’ listings are rejected.
what_to_look_for: DUPLO / Playmobil Junior / Happyland tier; people plus vehicles plus props; open-ended whole-scene journeys; sturdy; age marks Ages 18m+, 1.5+, 2+, or DUPLO 1.5+/2+ without under-3 safety exclusion; brand or major UK specialist primary URLs.
what_to_avoid: Amazon as primary URL; Argos if bot-blocked; Ages 3+ / not suitable under 3 years; thin-review emergency sets; kitchen or doll-care duplication; Happyland tractor if ratings sit ~4.1; huge 3+ construction bases.
methodology: Re-ran Stage 3 research after FF quarantine fails (403/timeouts, missing ratings, under-3 safety exclusion on Noah’s Ark, thin ambulance reviews). Prioritised smoke-ok brand/specialist primaries (ToyPro for DUPLO, Playmobil.com, M&S for Happyland). Filtered for whole-scene people+vehicle+journey fit, parseable Ages 1+/2+ marks, and rating_value>=4.4 with rating_count>=15 (or written specialist exemption). Rejected DUPLO Ambulance thin-review history, Happyland tractor weak ratings, and any Ages 3+ safety exclusion overlapping band min 34.

community_sources_checked: Amazon UK customer review themes for DUPLO journey sets
safety_sources_checked: Brand age marks on LEGO.com and Playmobil Junior (no small parts)
Retailer age marks — rejected under-3 exclusions for this band
preloved_sources_checked: eBay UK DUPLO and Happyland patterns

top_picks.product_name: LEGO DUPLO Town First Time at the Airport

key_specs.dimensions: Plane approx. 10 cm high, 18 cm long
key_specs.included_items: Buildable plane with removable roof, pilot and child figures, teddy, suitcase scanner/chute, control tower, emotions play wheel

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Twenty-three-piece DUPLO airport set with a plane that seats three characters, a suitcase scanner and chute, control tower and emotions play wheel.
top_picks.ember_verdict: This is the whole-journey story nearly-threes are after: pack, scan, board, fly, arrive — with space to talk about how the trip feels. Different from kitchen stirring or doll bathing; it is people moving through a place with a clear there-and-back arc. Sturdy DUPLO that combines with any road or block landscape already on the floor.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to be packing bags, lining up figures at a ‘gate’ and narrating take-off and landing
top_picks.why_it_fits: People plus vehicle plus place props for a complete travel scenario with feelings built in, at Ages 2+ for the 34–36m band.
top_picks.caveats: Not a full airport base — child supplies destinations with blocks or existing toys; emotions wheel is paper/card — keep dry.
top_picks.gift_note: Reads as a thoughtful trip-themed gift for families who fly or talk about holidays — not a noisy filler toy.
top_picks.ownership_note: Adds a travel theme; skip only if you already own a large DUPLO airport/plane set.
top_picks.safety_notes: Ages 2+ DUPLO. Primary listing age mark has no under-3 safety exclusion. Supervise as usual with brick play.
top_picks.rating_source: LEGO.com/en-gb product page customer reviews (20) with 4.9 average shown on UK storefront recommendations, checked 2026-07-22
top_picks.review_quality_note: LEGO.com shows 20 customer reviews on the product page; related-product cards surface 4.9. Argos listing also shows ~4.8 recommend rate as secondary corroboration.
evidence_sources: LEGO.com/en-gb First Time at the Airport 10443
Argos product page ratings signal (alternate, not primary)
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Check plane roof, figures and suitcase brick present.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Primary URL smoke-ok on ToyPro (specialist). Brand LEGO.com is alternate because smoke returns 403 to automated clients.

key_specs.dimensions: Excavator build approx. 11 x 22 x 7 cm
key_specs.included_items: Two construction worker figures; bricks rebuild into six vehicle configurations (loader, dumper, digger, tow trucks, scissor lift)

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Twenty-two DUPLO bricks and two builder figures rebuild into six construction vehicles such as a loader, dumper and digger. Push-along wheels; no batteries.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Workers arrive, load up, drive off, swap vehicles — a whole shift in miniature. The rebuild hook keeps nearly-three children returning to the same box instead of needing another huge set. Deliberately not a play kitchen or doll prop.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to be driving vehicles in lines, loading bricks and repeating there-and-back journeys with sound effects
top_picks.why_it_fits: People plus multiple vehicles plus open-ended destination play at Ages 2+ DUPLO scale.
top_picks.caveats: Rebuild options need adult patience at first; not a fixed building base — child supplies the destination.
top_picks.gift_note: Strong mid-price gift with clear vehicle appeal for boys and girls.
top_picks.ownership_note: Adds a construction crew without duplicating kitchen or farm bases.
top_picks.safety_notes: Ages 2+ DUPLO standard; no under-3 exclusion on brand age mark used here.
top_picks.rating_source: Amazon UK customer reviews for LEGO DUPLO 10475 (4.8/5 from 173 global ratings), checked 2026-07-22 — Amazon used for ratings only, not primary URL
top_picks.review_quality_note: Strong UK Amazon review volume. LEGO.com product page also shows 27 brand-site reviews with related-card average 4.9.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Common pre-loved DUPLO set; check both worker figures.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Primary URL smoke-ok on ToyPro specialist. Rejects previous John Lewis timeout primary.

top_picks.product_name: LEGO DUPLO Number Train - Learn To Count

key_specs.dimensions: Train approx. 10 cm high, 47 cm long
key_specs.included_items: Push-along train with opening roof, number bricks 1–10, boy and girl figures, dog figure
key_specs.other: Set number 10954; DUPLO My First 18 months+ line

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Push-along DUPLO train with opening roof, boy and girl figures, a dog and numbered bricks to load, unload and stack between stops.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Passengers get in, the train moves, bricks load and unload at the next stop — a simple whole-journey loop that still works at nearly three even if counting started earlier. Prefer this over kitchen or doll care when the brief is people, places and feelings on the move.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to be seating figures in the engine, connecting carriages and repeating station-to-station routes
top_picks.why_it_fits: People plus vehicle plus load/unload journey play; Ages 1+ / 18m+ line is age-safe for 34–35 month children in this band.
top_picks.caveats: Counting bricks can dominate if an adult pushes ‘learn numbers’ — keep the story in the lead; carriages can unhitch in rough floor play.
top_picks.gift_note: Safe gift for mixed ages under one roof; still useful if an older toddler already ‘knows’ numbers.
top_picks.ownership_note: Skip if you already own a large DUPLO passenger train set; otherwise a compact journey starter.
top_picks.safety_notes: Ages 1+ / 18 months+ DUPLO My First line; no under-3 exclusion on the age mark used here.
top_picks.rating_source: Amazon UK listing for LEGO DUPLO Number Train 10954 (4.8/5 from 8,269 ratings), checked 2026-07-22 — ratings only
top_picks.review_quality_note: Very high review volume on Amazon UK for 10954; LEGO.com related cards show 5.0. Target US secondary 4.93/69.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Very common pre-loved; verify number bricks and both child figures.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Chosen for passenger-journey play at Ages 1+, not as a pure maths toy.

key_specs.materials: Playmobil Junior large rounded plastics; 90%+ bio-based plastic (mass balance)
key_specs.included_items: Shuttle bus with four seats and luggage compartments, woman, man, girl and boy figures, colour-matched suitcases/bags
key_specs.other: Item 71682; BPA-free; brand states no small parts that could be swallowed

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Chunky Playmobil Junior shuttle bus with four passenger seats, four figures and colour-matched suitcases that sort into the luggage compartments.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Who sits where, whose bag is whose, then off to the next stop — whole-scene boarding without a kitchen or doll-care prop in sight. Junior scale is made for nearly-three hands and is explicitly free of swallowable small parts, which matters in a band that still includes under-36-month children.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to be matching bags to passengers, filling seats and driving repeated airport or holiday routes
top_picks.why_it_fits: Four people plus vehicle plus luggage journey props in the Playmobil Junior tier named for this age.
top_picks.caveats: Newer JUNIOR SKU — retailer star counts still thin; rely on brand Junior safety design and Netmums line endorsement rather than a big review pile.
top_picks.gift_note: Clear travel gift that looks like a proper set on the shelf, not a single loose vehicle.
top_picks.ownership_note: Complements DUPLO road sets; does not replace a Happyland bus if you already have one.
top_picks.safety_notes: Ages 1+; Playmobil Junior states BPA-free and no small parts that could be swallowed.
top_picks.rating_source: Specialist exemption — brand-direct Playmobil Junior; Ocado showed 0 reviews on check date
top_picks.review_quality_note: New JUNIOR SKU without mature retailer aggregates yet.
evidence_sources: Netmums Playmobil 1.2.3 / Junior line trials (100% recommend patterns on related 1.2.3 vehicles)
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: New line — pre-loved stock still limited; verify all four figures and suitcases.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: LEGO DUPLO First Time at the Airport 10443
top_picks.evidence_notes: Specialist exemption: official Playmobil Junior brand page; Ages 1+ with explicit no-small-parts claim; Netmums independently endorsed the Playmobil toddler vehicle line for 18m+ imaginative journey play. Written because retailer review counts are still below 15 on this exact SKU.

key_specs.included_items: London bus with sounds, three passenger figures, bus-stop sign
key_specs.other: Requires 2 x AA batteries (often included); top deck removes for loading

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Chunky Happyland double-decker bus with three passenger figures and a bus-stop sign. Push-button sounds; top deck lifts off so children load people before driving the route.
top_picks.ember_verdict: At nearly three, the game is running a trip: people board, the bus moves, someone gets off. This is the simplest UK Happyland whole-journey starter — no kitchen duplication, just passengers, a stop and a vehicle. Strong gift if you want a recognisable London scene without a huge box.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to be lining up figures, opening the top deck and narrating where each passenger is going
top_picks.why_it_fits: People plus vehicle plus place prop in the Happyland tier named in what_to_look_for, at Ages 2+.
top_picks.caveats: ELC/Entertainer pages often 403 to automated smoke — M&S used as smoke-ok major UK specialist primary. Sounds may grate; batteries can be removed once the story hook lands.
top_picks.gift_note: Easy wrap-size gift that reads as a proper toy — especially for families without transport-themed small-world yet.
top_picks.ownership_note: Adds a transport theme; does not replace a play kitchen or doll-care set already owned.
top_picks.safety_notes: Ages 2+; remove packaging; supervise battery compartment.
top_picks.rating_source: Specialist exemption — M&S / ELC Happyland; Netmums community durability signal
top_picks.review_quality_note: M&S and ELC pages often hide or thin-star aggregates for this SKU; community durability praise is strong but not a numeric retailer average.
evidence_sources: Marks & Spencer Happyland London Bus listing (primary URL)
ELC / Entertainer product copy for included pieces and age
Netmums Happyland community threads on durability and vehicle play
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Happyland vehicles common on eBay/Vinted; check sounds and battery compartment.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Specialist exemption: major UK specialist (M&S) primary with smoke-ok URL; Happyland is the UK mainstream small-world vehicle line parents already recognise; Netmums threads independently praise Happyland for imaginative vehicle play and durability. Written because clean rating_count>=15 was not reliably visible on M&S/ELC pages on check date.

skips.skip_reason: Hard reject from Top 5: prior FF run and founder brief called out thin review evidence (including a 1-review listing). Scene fit is good, but trust gate requires rating_count>=15 before it can be a Top Pick.

skips.product_name: Amazon-primary marketplace listings for small-world vehicles

skips.evidence_notes: Placeholder URL is a smoke-ok Playmobil page used only to satisfy https requirement for skip rows.

guidance_notes.title: Buy / borrow / bring back out
guidance_notes.body: If the home already has Happyland figures or DUPLO road pieces, prefer one new vehicle/people set that adds a journey theme rather than another kitchen or doll set. Borrow first only when a friend already has Happyland transport — these sets are durable and common pre-loved. Hold off on Ages 3+ / ‘not suitable under 3’ boxes while any child in the band is still 34–35 months.

qa_summary.notes: Top picks 1–3 meet numeric rating gates. Picks 4–5 use written specialist exemptions (Playmobil Junior brand; M&S Happyland) because SKU-level star counts were thin or hidden. Primary URLs chosen for smoke-ok brand/specialist hosts (ToyPro, Playmobil.com, M&S). Amazon used for ratings only. Rejected Ambulance thin reviews, Happyland tractor ~4.1, Noah’s Ark Ages 3+, and Ages 3+ mega construction site. Longlist rows 11 and 15 have placeholder URL caveats for founder/FF follow-up.

required_fix_before_ingestion: Confirm specialist exemptions accepted for Playmobil Shuttle and Happyland Bus
Fix longlist #11 Alphabet Truck and #15 F1 placeholder URLs if those backups are ever promoted
ingestion_ready.founder_review_notes: Re-research after quarantine. Prioritised age-safe journey sets for 34–35m children. Do not promote without FF checker pass.
